chapter_title: Auto. Wrecking & Salvage Yards in Certain Counties
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person operates an automotive wrecking and salvage yard in violation of this chapter.

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

(c) Each day a violation continues is a separate offense.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 397. Auto. Wrecking & Salvage Yards in Certain Counties
##### § 397.012 — Penalty

(a) A person commits an offense if the person operates an automotive wrecking and salvage yard in violation of this chapter.

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

(c) Each day a violation continues is a separate offense.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person operates an automotive wrecking and salvage yard in violation of this chapter.

subsections.text: Each day a violation continues is a separate offense.
